title: Meta tests AI shopping research tool to rival ChatGPT, Gemini

content:

title: Solomon tells OpenAI CEO Sam Altman that Tumbler Ridge deserves apology
description: Federal Artificial Intelligence Minister says he met with the CEO of OpenAI and told him the people of Tumbler Ridge, B.C., deserve an apology.
content:

title: Brokerages split on future of IT as AI automates nuts and bolts
description: Analysts are divided in their opinion over the long-term viability of IT services firms, after Anthropic released artificial intelligence software plugins that will allow companies to automate several tasks, including in finance, research and human resources. While some forecast revenue impact and earnings downgrades, others maintain that AI would expand the market for service providers.

title: Trump says deal on data centers will lower electricity prices as tech companies vow to cover costs
description: President Donald Trump invited technology companies to the White House on Wednesday to commit to developing their own power generation as he tries to ease tensions over the cost of electricity used by data centers to develop artificial intelligence.
content:
